heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
label: 941 to 956 Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
notes: Section 941, acts , pt. II, § 217, ; , , related to qualifications for appointments and enlistments in the Reserves. See sections 12102, 12201, and 12204 of Title 10, Armed Forces. , , was repealed by , , .July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 486July 30, 1956, ch. 789, § 4(a)70 Stat. 729Act July 30, 1956, ch. 789, § 4(a)70 Stat. 729Pub. L. 85–861, § 36A72 Stat. 1570Sept. 2, 1958

Section 942, , pt. II, § 218, , authorized the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate, to make appointments to general or flag officer grade. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 487section 12203 of Title 10

Section 943, , pt. II, § 219, , authorized the President to make appointments in commissioned grades below general or flag officer grades. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 487section 12203 of Title 10
Section 944, , pt. II, § 220, , related to appointments in warrant officer grades. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 487section 12241 of Title 10
Section 945, , pt. II, § 221, , related to tenure of appointments of commissioned officers. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 487section 12203 of Title 10
Section 946, , pt. II, § 222, , provided for a common Federal appointment for officers. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 487section 12201(a) of Title 10
Section 947, , pt. II, § 223, , prescribed tenure of appointments of warrant officers. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 487section 12241 of Title 10

Section 948, , pt. II, § 224, , provided for indefinite term of appointment, conversion of appointments and enlistments. See sections 12203 and 12241 of Title 10 and note set out under .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 487section 12203 of Title 10
Section 949, , pt. II, § 225, , provided for physical examinations. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 488section 12644 of Title 10
Section 950, , pt. II, § 226, , provided for discharge or transfer of physically disqualified personnel. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 488section 12644 of Title 10
Section 951, , pt. II, § 227, , related to term of enlistment. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 488section 12103 of Title 10
Section 952, , pt. II, § 228, , related to common Federal enlistments. See sections 12102 and 12107 of Title 10.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 488
Section 953, , pt. II, § 229, , prohibited dual membership in reserve components. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 488section 10213 of Title 10
Section 954, , pt. II, § 230, , related to enlisted personnel as officer candidates. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 489section 12209 of Title 10
Section 955, , pt. II, § 231, , related to age limitation for officers.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 489
Section 956, , pt. II, § 232, , authorized appointment or enlistment of limited-service personnel. See sections 12102 and 12201 of Title 10.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 489
